items.title: Deep Learning (Goodfellow, Bengio, Courville)
items.author: Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio, Aaron Courville
items.note: Chapter on feedforward networks covers softmax output layers and their role in multi-class classification.

items.title: PyTorch softmax and log_softmax documentation
items.author: PyTorch Developers
items.note: Reference implementation of numerically stable softmax and log-softmax used in production training.

items.title: Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning (Bishop)
items.author: Christopher M. Bishop
items.note: Multinomial logistic regression and softmax as the natural link from linear scores to Categorical probabilities.
